sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13268" key="a)ponarka/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποναρκ-άω</orth>, <sense id="n13268.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be quite torpid,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρὸς πόνους</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.8f</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
